title: Internal error when declaring parametric mailbox instance inside parametric module using type parameter

features.name: parametric mailbox with type parameter in parametric module
features.description: Code should include a parametric module with a type parameter containing a mailbox declaration that uses that type parameter

features.name: parametric module instantiation with struct type argument
features.description: Code should include a parametric module instantiation where the type argument is a struct type
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic a; logic b; } my_struct_t;
dummy #(my_struct_t) u_dummy();
